subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! I am Thy servant and the son of Thy servant, and confess that Thine essence is incomparable and of absolute sanctity
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی انا عبدک و ابن عبدک اکون معترفا بتقدیس ذاتک عن الاشباه و تنزیه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
